title: Broadcast Desk Update Response
description: Students open a teacher-created Broadcast Desk Update, follow the instructions, and submit required production evidence or response.
studentTask: Open the assigned Broadcast Desk Update, follow the instructions, and submit the required media evidence or response.
evidenceRequired: Submitted media link or uploaded file

rubric.description: Complete, polished, on time, and clearly meets or extends the stated requirements.
Complete and meets the stated requirements.
Partially complete or missing required evidence.
Attempted but incomplete, unclear, or not functional.

reflectionPrompt: What did you contribute, what worked, and what would you improve next time?
